title: ScimUser
description: A user record conforming to SCIM 2.0 protocol. Contains user profile attributes, roles, and team memberships.

id.description: The unique identifier assigned to the user

userName.description: The login username for the user

givenName.description: The first name of the user

familyName.description: The last name of the user

formatted.description: The full formatted name of the user

displayName.description: The display name of the user

emails.description: The email addresses for the user

primary.description: Whether this is the primary email

active.description: Whether the user account is active

roles.description: The roles assigned to the user

groups.description: The teams the user belongs to
